question: Transformer T-018 has a sudden hydrogen increase relative to baseline. Determine the likely root cause class and recommend one confirmatory measurement.
answer:
The likely root cause class of the sudden hydrogen increase relative to baseline in transformer T-018 is Arc Discharge. A
recommended confirmatory measurement is dissolved acetylene (C2H2) in oil.
